title: Customer Service Representative
description:
The Customer Support Business Group focuses on enabling our customers with premier customer support throughout their lifecycle with Lam. We drive performance, productivity, safety, and quality of customers installed base performance and deliver service and lifecycle solutions for their most critical equipment and processes.

This position will interact with customers, company sales and/or service representatives to handle a variety of pre-sales or post-sales functions. Portfolio includes receiving customer’s requests and preparing documents related to processing Spares orders, material returns (RMA) and exchanges. Maintain records (i.e. SAP transactions) on the status of parts returns repairs, replacements and delivery schedules. Ensure Spares transactional information is accessible by sorting and filing documents/forms/reports. Handle requests for additional company materials. Maintain records of returns, order schedule change, changes in Spares Parts pricing, and resolve return credit problems.

Job Description & Requirements

  • Process & fulfill quotations/orders/deliveries according to customers’ requests
  • Expediting Spares Escalations & Hot Order Teams to pull in parts in order to meet customer request dates
  • Prepare open order reports & coordinate pricing discrepancies verification for customers/account teams
  • Review On Time Delivery report and verify misses to expedite for recovery accordingly
  • Maintain customers consignment programs by replenishing & billing per schedule
  • Review new customer specific requirements and ensure support plan is in line with Lam’s business process
  • Maintain billing due list and submit billing to finance
  • Obtain approval and perform return credit transactions when necessary
  • Review quarter closing checklist to ensure tasks are fulfilled accordingly
  • Prepare & generate Shipping Authorization (ZSA) documents and arrange for shipments and thereafter track shipment with forwarders for order status
  • Return Authorization Management transactions in SAP (creations, receiving, shipping)
  • Work with and track 3PL local delivery service to meet customer Machine Down requirements
  • Ensure all DNs (orders to warehouse) are delivered on time
  • Failure Analysis & Defective In-Transit Returns
  • Quality inspection at warehouse when required

Foreign Trade Compliance: 

  • Ensure SAP transactions for controlled parts are submitted to Foreign Trade for approval and release
  • Track and make sure controlled parts (cores) are returned and shipped back per the Return Authorization Management process
  • Execution of Singapore’s Internal Control Plan
  • Attend to queries from customs and Foreign Trade audit, filing and reports to customs when required
  • Any other general administrative duties as assigned by the Immediate Supervisor

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma with more than 5 years or Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 2 years of customer support experience
  • Good knowledge of MS Office Suite especially with MS Excel
  • Good experience with SAP (MM Module)
  • Good communication and interpersonal relations skill
  • Independent and is able to multi-task
  • Required to be on rotating standby duties (lunch/public holidays/weekends - phone) to support customer urgent orders.
  • This is a 2 years contract role.

postedCompany.description:
LAM RESEARCH SINGAPORE PTE LTD

As a leading global suppier of wafer fabricaton equipment and sevices to the semiconductor industry, Lam Research develops innovative solutions that help our customers build smaller, faster, more powerful, and more power-efficient electronic devices. This success is the result of our employees' diverse technical and business expertise, which fuels close collaboration and on going innovation.

Headquartered in Fremont, California with facilities in North America, Europe and Asia, Lam's etch, clean and deposition product lines are driving the proliferation of technology into our everday lives.

Join the Lam Research Team, where you can write your own success story. Come help us solve our customers' toughest problemsand be part of a company that plays a vital role in the future of electronics   Lam Research - a company where successful people want to work
